title: Read DHT22 Temperature and Humidity
content: Reads temperature (°C) and relative humidity (%) from a DHT22 sensor using the Adafruit DHT library.
code:
import adafruit_dht
import board

def read_dht22(pin: int) -> dict:
    """Read temperature and humidity from a DHT22 sensor.

    Args:
        pin: GPIO pin number the sensor data line is connected to.

    Returns:
        dict with keys 'temperature_c' (float) and 'humidity_pct' (float).
        Returns None values on read failure.
    """
    import busio
    dht_device = adafruit_dht.DHT22(getattr(board, f'D{pin}'))
    try:
        temperature = dht_device.temperature
        humidity = dht_device.humidity
        return {'temperature_c': temperature, 'humidity_pct': humidity}
    except RuntimeError:
        return {'temperature_c': None, 'humidity_pct': None}
    finally:
        dht_device.exit()

input_schema.name: pin
input_schema.description: GPIO pin number (BCM numbering) for the sensor data line

benchmark_tests.name: output_keys_present
benchmark_tests.description: Verify the function returns a dict with the expected keys (mocked sensor).
